boundary_definition: Layer 0 final query token attention scores after scaled QK, after causal/sliding mask application and attention sink concatenation, before softmax/probabilities/V consumption/output.
layout_interpretation: head-major [query_head, key_position_or_sink], flattened with all real key positions 0..token_count-1 followed by sink at position token_count for each head

mask_metadata.causal_mask_behavior: torch.triu(-inf, diagonal=1); for final query token no future real key positions exist
mask_metadata.attention_sink_behavior: official attn.sinks reshaped as [num_kv_heads, heads_per_kv], flattened in query-head order, and concatenated as the final pre-softmax column

next_bounded_step: Runtime-forward can compare its final-token post-mask/pre-softmax layer-0 attention score tensor against this official boundary; do not broaden to softmax, V, or attention output yet.
